title: Settlement Payload
description: Canonical schema for the matching-engine settlement payload that Soroban contract tests verify against. Both the Rust backend (matching_engine/src/settlement/mod.rs) and the contract test harness (contracts/settlement/src/lib.rs) must produce and consume data that conforms to this schema.

data_hash.description: Hex-encoded SHA-256 hash of the SettlementData fields in canonical order (trade_id, maker, taker, token0, token1, amount0_be, amount1_be, price_be, timestamp_be, nonce). Used as the message that all three parties sign.

encoded.description: Base64-encoded JSON of the SettlementData, used as the on-chain invocation argument.

SettlementData.description: Single-trade settlement data shared between the matching engine and the Soroban settlement contract.

trade_id.description: Unique identifier for the matched trade. The Soroban contract tracks settled trade_ids to prevent replay.

maker.description: Stellar account address of the order maker.

taker.description: Stellar account address of the order taker.

token0.description: Stellar contract address of the first token in the pair.

token1.description: Stellar contract address of the second token in the pair.

amount0.description: Stroops of token0 to transfer from maker to taker.

amount1.description: Stroops of token1 to transfer from taker to maker.

price.description: Execution price (token1 per token0, in stroops).

timestamp.description: Unix millisecond timestamp at which the trade was matched.

nonce.description: UUID v4 generated fresh for every settlement payload. Combined with trade_id in the hash to ensure each payload is unique even for retried settlements, enabling tamper-evident verification.

maker_signature.description: Hex-encoded Ed25519 signature of data_hash by the maker's key (128 hex chars = 64 bytes).

taker_signature.description: Hex-encoded Ed25519 signature of data_hash by the taker's key (128 hex chars = 64 bytes).

engine_signature.description: Hex-encoded Ed25519 signature of data_hash by the matching engine's key (128 hex chars = 64 bytes).

SettlementBatch.description: Batch envelope wrapping multiple SettlementData entries for gas-efficient on-chain execution.

batch_id.description: UUID v4 uniquely identifying this batch submission.

settlements.description: Ordered list of settlements in this batch.

total_amount0.description: Sum of all settlement amount0 values. The contract verifies this matches the per-settlement sum using checked arithmetic.

total_amount1.description: Sum of all settlement amount1 values. The contract verifies this matches the per-settlement sum using checked arithmetic.

timestamp.description: Unix millisecond timestamp when the batch was assembled.
